title: Remove Open RDP Access from Security Group
console_steps: 3. Select the security group with open RDP
6. Find the rule with port 3389 and source 0.0.0.0/0 or ::/0
7. Either delete the rule or restrict source to your IP/CIDR
terraform_snippet:
resource "aws_security_group_rule" "rdp_restricted" {
  type              = "ingress"
  from_port         = 3389
  to_port           = 3389
  protocol          = "tcp"
  cidr_blocks       = ["10.0.0.0/8"]  # Private only
  security_group_id = aws_security_group.main.id
}

references.title: Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0/0 to port 3389
